meaning: adj.偏僻的,北部的adv.在州的北部n.州的北部
examples: They retired and went to live upstate.
These buses will carry families upstate to visit relatives in prison.
He was texting on one mobile phone while his vehicle struck a car in the upstate Oxford town of Lockport.
Dennis Masellis is behind bars in an upstate New York prison, where he is serving a three-to-nine-year sentence.
Cuomo is proposing three upstate casinos, which could generate little voter support in New York City.
